focus: ATR DC#2 confirmed (0.77) + BIC DC#1 confirmed (0.72) — both tier-3 theorems advancing toward D4

SI45_CIAP.ontological_types: theoretical (DC#1 game theory), designed empirical (DC#2 adversarial ML), emergent competitive (DC#3 economic markets)
SI45_CIAP.note: Highest-confidence D4 theorem. Meta-theorem: ceiling_TCA and ceiling_GCRSC are CIAP corollaries. Parent of both RCBC (×RAAI) and BIC (×AIIP).

SI47_RCBC.description: RAAI × CIAP conjunction: benchmark score inflation while CA stagnates/degrades. First tier-3 theorem.

SI48_ATR.description: RAAI × AATE conjunction: multi-stage OA-feedback training produces monotone irrecoverable d' degradation. Standard alignment pipeline is anti-pattern for introspective self-knowledge.
SI48_ATR.dc1: AI training literature — designed empirical (sycophancy escalation, InstructGPT calibration regression, Constitutional AI multi-stage, Kadavath calibration studies). Confirmed C81.
SI48_ATR.dc2: Educational over-coaching — designed empirical, distinct mechanism (metacognitive displacement). Koretz 2008, Hacker 1998, Bol 2001, Karpicke 2008. Confirmed C82.
SI48_ATR.d4_path: 3+ ZR cycles (3/3 done) + 3 ontological DC types (1 type done, 2 domains done — need regulated institutional)
SI48_ATR.dc3_candidate: Organizational compliance layering — regulated institutional: procedural compliance training degrades judgment quality
SI48_ATR.key_corollary: Safety-Self-Knowledge Tradeoff: behavioral safety metrics improve while d' degrades — decoupled by OA-calibration structure. Confirmed DC#1 and DC#2.
SI48_ATR.note: ZR requirement met (3 passive cycles). Remaining gap: DC#3 must be a different ontological type (regulated institutional) to satisfy 3-type requirement for D4.

SI49_BIC.description: CIAP × AIIP conjunction: when AIIP fails, CIAP gaming propagates across correlated benchmark portfolio. Effective K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄)+ε << nominal K. Portfolio diversification cannot fix evaluation when AIIP fails.
SI49_BIC.derivation_1: Formal effective-K collapse: K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄)+ε, CIAP amplifies AIIP failure
SI49_BIC.derivation_2: Information-theoretic: I(G_i; G_j) > 0 under AIIP failure + CIAP → K_eff → 1 in limit
SI49_BIC.dc1: AI evaluation benchmark literature — designed empirical. Schaeffer 2023 (emergent abilities = metric artifacts), GLUE/SuperGLUE saturation dynamics, Magar 2022 contamination transfer, HELM implied K_eff < 42. Confirmed C82.
SI49_BIC.d4_path: 3+ ZR cycles + 3 ontological DC types (1/3 done)
SI49_BIC.dc2_candidate: Fine-tuning transfer experiments — Dodge 2020, Liu 2022 LoRA transfer; designed empirical second domain
SI49_BIC.dc3_candidate: Educational assessment portfolio or scientific replication consortia — different ontological type
key_corollaries: Portfolio diversification failure (adding correlated benchmarks has vanishing K_eff gain)
Emergent abilities as BIC artifact (confirmed by Schaeffer 2023)
SI49_BIC.rcbc_relationship: RCBC = within-benchmark inflation; BIC = across-portfolio K_eff collapse. Together close 'add more benchmarks' response.

candidates.name: ATR
candidates.gap: DC#3 must be regulated institutional type

passive_accumulation.ATR_ZR: ZR cycle 3 — PASS C82. ZR requirement met.
